name: Battery voltage shall not exceed 420V
Battery voltage shall not drop below 280V
Battery current shall not exceed 300A
Battery temperature shall not exceed 45 degrees C
Battery temperature shall not drop below minus 20 degrees C
SOC warning shall trigger below 20 percent
SOC critical shall trigger below 10 percent
SOH warning shall trigger below 80 percent
SOH critical shall trigger below 60 percent
Cell voltage imbalance shall not exceed 50mV
Motor speed shall not exceed 12000 RPM
Motor torque shall not exceed 350 Nm
Vehicle speed shall not exceed 200 km/h
Inverter temperature shall not exceed 85 degrees C
Regenerative braking shall recover minimum 70 percent energy
Accelerator position shall not exceed 100 percent of pedal travel
Power output shall not exceed 300 kW rated maximum
Energy consumption shall not exceed 25 kWh per trip
Drive mode selection shall respond within 500 ms of activation
Charging status shall update within 1 second during charging cycle
Motor current shall not exceed 300A during operation
Motor voltage shall not exceed 450V during operation
Available range estimation error shall not exceed 5 percent
Torque request shall not exceed 350 Nm motor torque limit
Powertrain fault status shall trigger DTC within 100 ms of fault detection
Cell minimum voltage shall not drop below 3.0V per cell
Cell maximum voltage shall not exceed 4.2V per cell
